description:
Before watchdog compacts context (/compact), extract learnings.

Architecture (from education/005):
```
.bowman/memory/sessions/{session-id}.json: {
  timestamp, duration, aimsWorked, 
  outcomes, patterns, lessonsLearned
}
```

Implementation: ~8 hours
1. Modify watchdog.ts: Before /compact, send reflection prompt
2. Prompt: "Summarize: What did you accomplish? What patterns emerged? What would you do differently?"
3. Store compressed summary (not full transcript)
4. On startup: Load recent summaries → inject into INSTRUCT.md context
5. Recursive compression: Every N sessions, compress N summaries into meta-summary

Benefits:
- Learn from past mistakes
- Recognize recurring patterns
- Improve strategy over time
- Core ASI capability

status.comment: Implemented session memory compression and storage. Before watchdog compacts context, it now extracts learnings (aims worked, outcomes, patterns) and saves to .bowman/memory/sessions/{session-id}.json. Includes utilities for loading recent summaries and formatting for context injection. All tests pass. Implemented for both codex-session and claude-session watchdogs.
